name: nanofleet-vault
description: Secret manager with per-agent access control
author: NanoFleet
toolsDoc:
## nanofleet-vault — Secret Manager

### get_secret
Retrieve a secret value you are authorized to access.
- `name` (string): the secret name (e.g. `"GITHUB_TOKEN"`)

Returns `{ name, value }` if authorized, or an error if not authorized or not found.

## CRITICAL rules
- Only call `get_secret` when you actually need the value for a task.
- Never log, print or include secret values in messages, comments or results visible to others.
